sections.title: Appetizers
sections.description: Small plates to start or share.

items.name: Loaded Nachos
items.description: Tortilla chips with cheese, jalapenos, salsa, sour cream, and green onion.

items.name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
items.description: Warm cheese dip with toasted pita and tortilla chips.

items.name: Truffle Fries
items.description: Crispy fries tossed with parmesan, parsley, and truffle aioli.

items.name: Crispy Wings
items.description: One pound of wings tossed in your choice of hot, BBQ, or honey garlic sauce.

items.name: Dry Rub Wings
items.description: One pound of wings with smoky house spice and ranch dip.

items.name: Cauliflower Wings
items.description: Crispy cauliflower bites tossed in buffalo sauce with vegan ranch.

items.name: Classic Burger
items.description: Beef patty, cheddar, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, and house sauce.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Buttermilk fried chicken, slaw, pickles, and spicy mayo.

items.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
items.description: Beef patty with sauteed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, and garlic aioli.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Beer-battered fish with fries, tartar sauce, and lemon.

items.name: Steak Frites
items.description: Grilled striploin, herb butter, fries, and mixed greens.

items.name: Pesto Rigatoni
items.description: Rigatoni with basil pesto, cherry tomatoes, parmesan, and arugula.

items.name: Fries
items.description: Crispy fries with house seasoning.

items.name: Pretzel Bites
items.description: Warm pretzel bites with mustard dip.

items.name: Kettle Chips
items.description: House chips with onion dip.

items.name: House Pickles
items.description: Seasonal pickled vegetables with dill and chili.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine, parmesan, croutons, and creamy Caesar dressing.

items.name: House Lager
items.description: Draft pint.

items.name: Amber Ale
items.description: Draft pint with caramel malt and a crisp finish.

items.name: Rotating IPA
items.description: Ask about today's local tap.

items.name: Old Fashioned
items.description: Whiskey, bitters, sugar, and orange.

items.name: Spicy Margarita
items.description: Tequila, lime, orange liqueur, and jalapeno.

items.name: Negroni
items.description: Gin, bitter aperitif, sweet vermouth, and orange.

items.name: Sparkling Lemonade
items.description: Fresh lemon, soda, and simple syrup.

items.name: Ginger Beer
items.description: Spicy non-alcoholic ginger beer over ice.

items.name: Iced Tea
items.description: Fresh brewed black tea with lemon.
